announcements.title: Welcome to TrackExplorer!
announcements.summary: This is the first release of TrackExplorer, we hope you enjoy it!
announcements.content:
Come back to this page to get news and find out about new features.

In the meantime, play around with the app in demo mode (you can enable it in the Settings page), read the Help page for all the details, or just start experimenting with it.

You can also join other users in the discussion at https://github.com/giobiondani/TrackExplorerInfo/discussions.

Let us know what you think at info@trackexplorer.app.
